title: AB03 - Production Operator – Bag Packaging
description:
Position title : Bag Packaging Operator

Location: West - Boon Lay
Working Days:  5.5 days 
Working Hours: Monday to Friday 8am - 4.45pm (lunch hour 45mins) ; Saturday 8am - 12pm.
Salary : $2200 - $2600
Department: Manufacturing (Vacuum Bag) 
Reports to: Bag Packaging Supervisor

Role Overview:
Responsible for accurate bag packaging, quality inspection, material control, equipment care, and maintaining orderly, defect-free production processes.

Job Description

  • Adhere strictly to the approved first article sample validated by the Quality Inspector throughout the production process.
  • Assist in production preparation, perform inspection (for both quality and quantity), and help other operators with self-checks to improve production quality.
  • Handle all products with care to prevent defects such as stains, scratches, dents, or damage during packaging and transfer.
  • Keep all packaging materials, semi-finished goods, finished products, and tools neatly organized according to the required layout.
  • Use packaging materials reasonably, prevent waste or loss, control packaging consumption, save energy, and reduce production costs.
  • Report production issues promptly and rework defective products immediately; ensure no defective products enter the finished goods area.
  • Check, maintain, and take care of production tools and equipment daily; use all tools properly.
  • Protect company property and avoid intentional damage to machines, tools, products, or packaging.
  • Perform other duties as assigned from time to time.

Requirements: 

  • Able to understand and follow packaging quality requirements as explained by the Quality Inspector and Team Leader prior to commencing work
  • The ability to distinguish colours where necessary.
  • Previous experience in packaging is an advantage

If you are keen to apply, please send me your resume and job applied for on WhatsApp at 8093 8699 or email me at anabel.thesupreme@gmail.com (˶ᵔ ᵕ ᵔ˶)

❄️Anabel Boon Xue Qi | Consultant Associate (R25159272) |📍The Supreme HR Advisory EA No: 14C7279
